summary: AAV UI v1 testing completed. All 5 features verified working: (1) Escrow Accounts page shows 'Agent Access' column with AAV indicator badges, (2) Create Escrow Account modal has Agent Authorization toggle with enforcement mode and agent IDs fields, (3) Fiduciary Policies page shows AAV Restricted badge count in stats cards, (4) Policy cards display AAV badges in header, (5) Expanded policy view shows Agent Authorization section with authorized agents and enforcement mode.

escrow_accounts_page.agent_access_column: PASS - Column header 'Agent Access' visible in table
escrow_accounts_page.aav_indicator_badges: PASS - Shows '3 Agents', '2 Agents', 'Any Key' badges correctly
escrow_accounts_page.badge_count: 6 AAV indicator badges found across escrow accounts

create_escrow_modal.agent_authorization_toggle: PASS - Toggle visible with Shield icon
create_escrow_modal.toggle_functionality: PASS - Clicking checkbox expands AAV section
create_escrow_modal.authorized_agent_ids_input: PASS - Input field with placeholder 'agent-1, agent-2, marketing-bot'
create_escrow_modal.info_message: PASS - Blue info box explaining AAV behavior

fiduciary_policies_page.aav_restricted_stats_card: PASS - Shows '3 AAV Restricted' in stats cards
fiduciary_policies_page.policy_card_aav_badges: PASS - 14 AAV badges found ('1 Agent', '2 Agents', 'Any Key')
fiduciary_policies_page.expanded_policy_aav_section: PASS - Shows Agent Authorization section with AAV Restricted badge, enforcement mode, and authorized agents list

critical_code_review_comments: AAV toggle visual element (div) click may not always trigger state change - the actual checkbox input click works reliably
Modal scrolling may be needed on smaller viewports to see full AAV section
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: AAV UI v1 fully implemented and tested. Escrow Accounts page has Agent Access column with badges. Create Escrow modal has AAV toggle that expands to show enforcement mode and agent IDs. Fiduciary Policies page has AAV Restricted stats card and policy cards show AAV badges. Expanded policy view shows full Agent Authorization section.
